scripts.dev: npx concurrently "cd Backend && node server.js" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:win: npx concurrently "cd Backend && node server.js" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:unix: npx concurrently "cd Backend && node server.js" "cd frontend && npm run dev -- --host"
scripts.test:backend:utils: cd Backend && npx jest tests/*.test.js --config jest.config.cjs
scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend:utils && npm run test:backend:services && npm run test:backend:models && npm run test:backend:middleware && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:backend:services: cd Backend && npx jest tests/*_service.test.js tests/user_service.test.js --config jest.config.cjs
scripts.test:backend:models: cd Backend && npx jest tests/user_model.test.js --config jest.config.cjs
scripts.test:backend:middleware: cd Backend && npx jest tests/*_middleware.test.js --config jest.config.cjs
